# PuToggleSwitch

## Intent

- toggle switch
- boolean setting
- on off control

## Prefer When

- Use for immediate boolean settings or preferences.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for deferred confirmation fields; use PuCheckbox.

## Import

```ts
import { PuToggleSwitch } from '@partner-up-dev/ui-web'
```

- `modelValue`
- `label`
- `disabled`
- `size`

## Slots

## Caveats

- Use size sm, md, or lg to map the switch label to caption, control, or body typography.
